idea-plugin.name: Prism
idea-plugin.description: Token-budgeted context capsules for coding agents. Exposes one MCP tool that compiles a task-scoped slice of Java/Kotlin code (target method, owning class skeleton, callees, callers, relevant types) using IntelliJ PSI/UAST. Designed for Claude Code, Codex, and other MCP-aware agents.
idea-plugin.change-notes: • Initial release: Java + Kotlin context capsules via MCP.
